versions.version_description: I added an important missing Chord the "G" in every second line

tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.version_description: These are all basic chords if you use a capo on the first fret.

content:
My first time tabbing a song . I'm sure it's not perfect, but really easy! :) Enjoy.

No capo. Standard tuning.

[tab]INSTRUMENTAL:
e--------------------------------------------------------------------|
B--5--3---------------5----3--------------5---3-----------5---3------|
G---------2-----2---------------0---0-------------0---0--------------|
D----------------------------------------------------------------4---|   (x2)
A--------------------------------------------------------------------|
E--------------------------------------------------------------------|[/tab]


[tab]     [ch]A[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]
How long before I get in?[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]D[/ch]                [ch]A[/ch]
Before it starts, before I begin?[/tab]
[tab]     ([ch]A[/ch])                [ch]G[/ch]
How long before you decide?[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]D[/ch]                [ch]A[/ch]
Before I know what it feels like?[/tab]
[tab]       ([ch]A[/ch])            [ch]G[/ch]
Where to, where do I go?[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]D[/ch]                [ch]A[/ch]
If you never try, then you'll never know.[/tab]
[tab]     ([ch]A[/ch])               [ch]G[/ch]
How long do I have to climb,[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]D[/ch]                [ch]A[/ch]
Up on the side of this mountain of mine?[/tab]

INSTRUMENTAL

[tab]     [ch]A[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]
Look up, I look up at night[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]D[/ch]                      [ch]A[/ch]
Planets are moving at the speed of light[/tab]
[tab]     ([ch]A[/ch])             [ch]G[/ch]
Climb up, up in the trees[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]D[/ch]                [ch]A[/ch]
Every chance that you get is a chance you seize[/tab]
[tab]     ([ch]A[/ch])              [ch]G[/ch]
How long, am I gonna stand[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]D[/ch]                [ch]A[/ch]
With my head stuck under the sand?[/tab]
[tab]   ([ch]A[/ch])               [ch]G[/ch]
I'll start, before I can stop[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]D[/ch]                    [ch]A[/ch]
Before I see things the right way up[/tab]


PRE-CHORUS:
[tab][ch]G[/ch]         [ch]A[/ch]                 [ch]Bm[/ch]
  All that noise, and all that sound,[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]          [ch]A[/ch]           [ch]Bm[/ch]
  All those places I got found.[/tab]

CHORUS:
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]                    [ch]D[/ch]
And birds go flying at the speed of sound,[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Bm[/ch]                 [ch]G6[/ch]
to show you how it all began.[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                         [ch]D[/ch]
Birds came flying from the underground,[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]A[/ch]                [ch]G[/ch]
if you could see it then you'd understand[/tab]

INSTRUMENTAL

[tab]  [ch]A[/ch]                   [ch]G[/ch]
Ideas that you'll never find[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]D[/ch]                    [ch]A[/ch]
Or the inventers could never design[/tab]
[tab]     ([ch]A[/ch])                  [ch]G[/ch]
The buildings that you put up[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]D[/ch]             [ch]A[/ch]
Japan and China, all lit up[/tab]
[tab]    ([ch]A[/ch])                [ch]G[/ch]
The sign that I couldn't read[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]D[/ch]                [ch]A[/ch]
Or a light that I couldn't see[/tab]
[tab]     ([ch]A[/ch])                    [ch]G[/ch]
Some things you have to believe[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]A[/ch]
But others are puzzles, puzzling me.[/tab]


PRE-CHORUS:
[tab][ch]G[/ch]         [ch]A[/ch]                 [ch]Bm[/ch]
  All that noise, and all that sound,[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]          [ch]A[/ch]           [ch]Bm[/ch]
  All those places I got found.[/tab]

CHORUS:
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]                    [ch]D[/ch]
And birds go flying at the speed of sound,[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Bm[/ch]                 [ch]G6[/ch]
to show you how it all began.[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                         [ch]D[/ch]
Birds came flying from the underground,[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]A[/ch]                [ch]G[/ch]
if you could see it then you'd understand[/tab]

BRIDGE:
[tab][ch]G[/ch]          [ch]A[/ch]                      [ch]Bm[/ch]
 All those signs, I knew what they meant.[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]D[/ch]
Some things you can invent.[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]            [ch]A[/ch]                  [ch]Bm[/ch]    [ch]G6[/ch]
  Some get made, and some get sent, ooh[/tab]

CHORUS:
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]                       [ch]D[/ch]
And words go flying at the speed of sound,[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Bm[/ch]                 [ch]G6[/ch]
to show you how it all began.[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                           [ch]D[/ch]
Birds came flying from the underground,[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]A[/ch]                [ch]Bm[/ch]
if you could see it then you'd understand[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]A[/ch]                [ch]G[/ch]
if you could see it then you'd understand.[/tab]
